titleStmt.title: SII 24.569: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 569.

summary.p: Records that certain epigraphs (relating to the endowments. made) by Chokkanātha-Nāyanivāru and Maṅgammagāru, having been destroyed by some miscreants, were re-engraved and kept on the east side of the tiruvuṇṇāḻigai (inner prākāra) at the instance of the servants of the temple. The inscription is dated Vṛisha, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 10, Sunday probably corresponding to 1761 A.D., August 9, Sunday f.d.t. ·35.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . viṣunāma
saṁvatsaraṁ śrāvaṇa śu
daśami Ālu yiśubhadi
namaṁdu gataṁ cōkkanātha
nāyanivāri pēriṭanuṁnnu
maṁggammagāri pēriṭanuṁnnu
śilāśāsanamuṁnnu vrāyiṁ
ci śrīraṁgganāyakula divyaca
raṇakaṁjamula chāyanu
Amarcivuṁḍḍaga vāru Ā śi
lāśāsanamunu Akkaḍavu
ṁḍakaṁḍā yevarō durmāgā
niki parihariṁccināru ganu
ka Aṁduku Ācāryula
vāruṁnnū śrīraṁgganārā
yaṇajīyyagāru mo
dalaina Anaṁttakottu pari
karamunnu

Ā śilāśāsanaṁ Ava
tala parihariṁccina
vārki śrīraṁganāyaku
la sannidhiyaṁddu tiru
ga pravēśaṁ lēkuṁḍḍā śē
Iṁcci Āśilāśāsana
muna tirugā yappaṭaṭṭē ja
yavijayula sannidhivāri
lōgā tiruvuṁṇāḷi pradakṣi
ṇamulōnu tūrpphuchāya
nu raṁgganāyakula divyaca
raṇakaṁjamulaku kiṁddanu A
marcci yā śilāśāsanaṁ Āca
ṁdrārkkasthāIgānu yāvat śca
ṁścadra sūryaśca yāvattiṣṭhati
mēdinī . Annaṭugānu yīśi
lāśāsanaṁ raṁgganāyakula
divyacaraṇakaṁjamulaku
kiṁddanē vuṁḍḍataggadi Ani sthaḷaṁ
Anaṁ ttakottu parikaramunnū
śēIṁccinadi . Īdharmānki yevaḍu
drōhaṁ talaṁstunāḍu vāḍu ga
ṁggātiramaṁdu kapilāvunu caṁ
ppina pāpamuṁnnu bhraṁhmahatyā
dipātakamuluṁnnū Anubha
viṁccunu Iṭani sammatiṁcci sthaḷa
ṁ Anaṁttakottu parikaramuṁnnu vrā
Iṁccina śilāśāsanalu .
Digital edition of SII 24.569 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
